Projects

Project Manager

After signing in, users can access available projects through the Project Manager.

Global Project

  • Available to all users by default
  • No configuration required
  • Ideal for exploring basic features

User-Specific Projects

These projects:

  • Require authorization
  • Include custom datasets and configurations
  • Are restricted based on user roles

This wiki provides a public overview of miraX features. Some functionalities may require access permissions.
